report:
Vegas Combat Robotics' vertical spinner - the hometown bot of the Las Vegas-taped Pro League.
Fandom confirms "a brand new JackPot build" was made for the inaugural Pro League.
Team's own announcement: "Bigger hits. Faster spin-ups. Stronger everywhere."
Career 6-5 in recorded fights; notably "DID beat Cobalt" in prior competition per r/battlebots.
Group C is rated wide open by fans: "Cobalt, Copperhead, or Jackpot could take the group".
This week draws Copperhead - the group's statistical favorite (14-6, Elo #4 in our book).
The same reddit thread warns Copperhead "eliminated both Endgame and Riptide" in FaceOffs - JackPot is the underdog on paper.
Official episode-2 promo leads with "Jackpot vs Copperhead" as the marquee Group C fight.
No damage or reliability issues surfaced in the scraped sources.
The scout read: rebuilt, confident, and facing the hardest first draw in the group.
note: cached demo report - written by Claude from the MCP-scraped sources listed (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY enables live generation)
